prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L L410 V8 (engine code: L410) – Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 compression pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing to handle 850+ HP reliably. Custom camshafts by Schrick with 280° duration and 12mm lift for aggressive overlap, paired with titanium retainers and dual valve springs from Ferrea.

Forced Induction: Twin-turbocharged setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (84mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipes merging into a dual-inlet, single-outlet 4.5-inch T6061 aluminum exhaust system by MagnaFlow, featuring 304 stainless steel 3.5-inch mufflers with quad 4-inch polished tips.

Fuel & Ignition: Full sequential port injection system by FuelTech FT600 ECU with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2000cc/min), and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering. Ignition system upgraded to MSD 8 Plus CDI box with NGK R7437-11 iridium spark plugs and custom 8mm silicone ignition wires by Taylor Cable. Methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual 5-gallon tanks and progressive controller for 30% methanol-water mix under boost.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk LB-WORKS, including custom front fenders with integrated cooling ducts, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares, and a one-off carbon fiber hardtop with a removable Targa-style panel. Front splitter and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem), modified to fit the Corniche II’s chassis with custom mounting points and adjustable canards.

Wheels & Suspension: Custom 22x10.5 ET25 (front) and 22x12.5 ET30 (rear) forged aluminum wheels by HRE Performance (FF03 model, brushed finish with polished lips), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/22 front, 335/25/22 rear). Air suspension by Air Lift Performance 3P management with custom valving for the Corniche II’s frame, paired with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (modified for air strut compatibility) and polyurethane bushings by SuperPro for reduced body roll.

Interior & Aero: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Katzkin, including dashboard, door cards, and custom Recaro CS bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, bolt-in design with integrated harness bars). Exterior aero includes a custom carbon fiber rear wing by Vorsteiner (adjustable angle, 3D-printed mounts), and a front lip spoiler by Seibon Carbon with integrated LED daytime running lights.
